query: SELECT id, authorName, bio IS NOT NULL as hasBio, avatarUrl IS NOT NULL as hasAvatar, s3AvatarUrl IS NOT NULL as hasS3Avatar, enrichedAt FROM author_profiles WHERE authorName LIKE '%Cialdini%' OR authorName LIKE '%Thaler%' OR authorName LIKE '%Hawking%' OR authorName = 'Founders Pocket Guide' ORDER BY authorName;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46FBtXPMNF6LwZ8.root --database ehSrGoKN2NYhXg8UYLtWGw --execute SELECT id, authorName, bio IS NOT NULL as hasBio, avatarUrl IS NOT NULL as hasAvatar, s3AvatarUrl IS NOT NULL as hasS3Avatar, enrichedAt FROM author_profiles WHERE authorName LIKE '%Cialdini%' OR authorName LIKE '%Thaler%' OR authorName LIKE '%Hawking%' OR authorName = 'Founders Pocket Guide' ORDER BY authorName;
